command:
echo "=== SAKURA: how does require_mention actually work? Find ALL mention settings ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "--- all require_mention / free_response / mention lines in config ---"
grep -nE "require_mention|free_response|mention|bot_username|@" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -30
echo ""
echo "--- is there a 'messages:' or 'group' section controlling this? ---"
grep -nE "^messages:|^routing:|^group|groupChat|bot_name|self_name" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -10
echo ""
echo "--- What does hermes consider a 'mention'? Check the source ---"
grep -rn "require_mention\|is_mention\|mention" /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/gateway/platforms/telegram.py 2>/dev/null | head -15
REMOTE
